statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$used" ] && [ -n "$remaining" ]; then pct=$(echo "scale=0; $used * 100 / 200000" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); bar=$(printf '%*s' "$((pct / 10))" '' | tr ' ' '▓'); printf 'Model: %s | Context: %s%% (%s%%) [%s]' "$model" "$used" "$remaining" "$bar"; else printf 'Model: %s' "$model"; fi
